published.text:
### Hero
Heading: AI Automation for Property Management
Body: Property management is a communication grind. Tenant maintenance requests at 11 PM. Lease renewal follow-ups that slip through the cracks. Prospective tenants calling about showings and getting voicemail. Owner reports that take hours to compile. AI automation handles the repetitive communication layer — tenant inquiries, maintenance routing, lease reminders, and showing coordination — so your team focuses on the work that actually requires judgment.
Sub: Below: what automation looks like for property management companies, which workflows deliver the fastest ROI, and how to decide if your operation is ready.

### Core sections
- What you can automate in property management
- Maintenance request intake and routing
- After-hours tenant communication
- Showing scheduling for vacancies
- Lease renewal campaigns

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers for property management companies considering automation

### Final CTA
Heading: Scale your portfolio without scaling your headcount
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at your current communication workflow, identify the biggest time drains, and map out what to automate first.

edits.description: Published as part of batch 2 of the bounded programmatic SEO rollout.
Structured for both search and AI-answer extraction with a direct answer opening, decision-oriented sections, FAQ, and proof-adjacent linking.
Commercial, practical, and grounded. No invented case-study claims.
Built to reinforce the existing consultant / industry / workflow clusters on dmytroai.com.
